A B C D E F G H I J L M N O P Q R S T U V W X Z

F

fade - Variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.CrossFade
Smoothly mixes between input[0] and input[1].
fade - Variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.FourWayFade
This port has two parts, 0 and 1, which fade between "left-to-right" and "back-to-front".
faderToDouble(int) - Method in class com.softsynth.view.CustomFaderDouble
Convert a value from the integer form to a double value ranging between the specified min and max.
feedback - Variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.circuits.MultiTapDelay
Determines the amount of low pass filtered output that is fed back into the input.
feedback - Variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.circuits.PluckedString
 
feedback - Variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.circuits.TunedPluckedString

Filter_StateVariable - Class in com.softsynth.jsyn
State Variable Filter This filter is based on the State Variable Filter described in Hal Chamberlain's "Musical Applications of MicroProcessors".

Band limited sawtooth wave table played through a state variable resonant filter.

findNamedPort(String) - Method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.SynthSound
 
findPointBefore(double) - Method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.view11x.EnvelopeEditor
Return index of point before this X position.
finish(boolean) - Method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.view102.InternalSynthScope
Call this after your last call to createProbe().
finish() - Method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.view102.InternalSynthScope
 
fixSizes() - Method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.util.WAVFileWriter
Fix RIFF and data chunk sizes based on final size.
FLAG_AUTO_STOP - Static variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.Synth
FLAG_AUTO_STOP is used with SynthEnvelopeQueue and SynthSampleQueue to make an instrument stop automatically when the data is finished.
FLAG_DISABLE_OUTPUT - Static variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.Synth
FLAG_DISABLE_OUTPUT turns off the audio output feature for machines that do not support full duplex recording.
FLAG_ENABLE_INPUT - Static variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.Synth
FLAG_ENABLE_INPUT turns on the audio capture feature.
FLAG_LOOP_IF_LAST - Static variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.Synth
FLAG_LOOP_IF_LAST is used with SynthEnvelopeQueue and SynthSampleQueue to request that the last block of data queued be looped until another block is queued.
FLAG_NON_REAL_TIME - Static variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.Synth
Request that the synthesis occur as fast as possible, which may be slower or faster than real-time.
FLAG_SKIP_IF_OTHERS - Static variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.Synth
FLAG_SKIP_IF_OTHERS is used with SynthEnvelopeQueue and SynthSampleQueue.
flush() - Method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.util.SampleQueueOutputStream
Wait until any data that has been written to the queue has been played.
FMOperator - Class in com.softsynth.jsyn.circuits
FM Operator Sine wave oscillator with amplitude envelope and control mixers.

frequency - Variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.Filter_HighShelf

frequency - Variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.Filter_LowShelf

frequency - Variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.Filter_StateVariable
Frequency of filter cutoff in Hertz.
frequency - Variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.ParabolicEnvelope
Fastest repeat rate of envelope if it were continually retriggered in Hertz.
frequency - Variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.StateVariableFilter

frequency - Variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.SynthNote
 
frequency - Variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.SynthOscillator

frequency - Variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.TunableFilter
